title: pelargonium cortusifolium
intro: Pelargonium cortusifolium, also known as the Cape Geranium, is a species of succulent plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. The health benefits of Pelargonium cortusifolium are attributed to its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which help to boost the immune system and fight off infections. Pelargonium cortusifolium is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, coughs, and sore throats.
